keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Substitution, Norway. Marcus Pedersen replaces Julian Ryerson because of an injury.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Goal! Norway 1, Senegal 0. Marcus Pedersen (Norway) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the top right corner.
First Half ends, Norway 1, Senegal 0.
Substitution, Norway. Patrick Berg replaces Fredrik Aursnes.
Second Half begins Norway 1, Senegal 0.
Goal! Norway 2, Senegal 0. Erling Haaland (Norway) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Martin Ødegaard with a through ball following a fast break.
Goal! Norway 2, Senegal 1. Ismaïla Sarr (Senegal) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Sadio Mané.
Substitution, Senegal. Ismail Jakobs replaces El Hadji Malick Diouf.
Substitution, Senegal. Ibrahim Mbaye replaces Pape Gueye.
Goal! Norway 3, Senegal 1. Erling Haaland (Norway) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Patrick Berg.
Delay in match because of an injury Édouard Mendy (Senegal).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Senegal. Mory Diaw replaces Édouard Mendy because of an injury.
Substitution, Senegal. Pathé Ciss replaces Lamine Camara.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Substitution, Norway. Andreas Schjelderup replaces Antonio Nusa.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Senegal. Pape Matar Sarr replaces Kalidou Koulibaly.
Substitution, Norway. Oscar Bobb replaces Alexander Sørloth.
Substitution, Norway. Leo Østigård replaces Torbjørn Heggem because of an injury.
Goal! Norway 3, Senegal 2. Ismaïla Sarr (Senegal) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Nicolas Jackson.
Delay in match because of an injury Leo Østigård (Norway).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Second Half ends, Norway 3, Senegal 2.
